name: auxo-mcp-server
description: Access AUXO Zero Trust and Case Management from Claude

zt_token.title: Zero Trust API Token
zt_token.description: Your AUXO Zero Trust API token. Providing this token automatically enables Zero Trust features (protect surfaces, locations, states, measures, etc.).

ticket_token.title: Tickets API Token
ticket_token.description: Your AUXO Tickets/Case Management API token. Providing this token automatically enables case management features.

api_url.title: API URL
api_url.description: AUXO API endpoint. Leave empty to use the default (api.on2it.net).

tools.name: createProtectSurface
tools.description: Create a new protect surface

tools.name: listProtectSurfaces
tools.description: List protect surfaces (with optional filters)

tools.name: getProtectSurface
tools.description: Get full details of a protect surface by ID

tools.name: updateProtectSurface
tools.description: Update an existing protect surface

tools.name: deleteProtectSurface
tools.description: Delete one or more protect surfaces

tools.name: createLocation
tools.description: Create a new location

tools.name: listLocations
tools.description: List all locations

tools.name: updateLocation
tools.description: Update an existing location

tools.name: deleteLocation
tools.description: Delete one or more locations

tools.name: createState
tools.description: Create a new state

tools.name: listStates
tools.description: List all states

tools.name: updateState
tools.description: Update an existing state

tools.name: deleteState
tools.description: Delete one or more states

tools.name: listContacts
tools.description: List all contacts

tools.name: listAssets
tools.description: List all assets

tools.name: listMeasures
tools.description: Search security measures from the AUXO catalog

tools.name: listProtectSurfaceMeasures
tools.description: List measures assigned to a protect surface

tools.name: updateProtectSurfaceMeasure
tools.description: Add or update measure implementation status on a protect surface

tools.name: removeMeasureFromProtectSurface
tools.description: Remove a measure assignment from a protect surface

tools.name: createTransactionFlow
tools.description: Create a flow between two protect surfaces

tools.name: createExternalFlow
tools.description: Create a flow to/from outside the organization

tools.name: listTransactionFlows
tools.description: List all flows for a protect surface

tools.name: deleteTransactionFlow
tools.description: Delete a flow between two protect surfaces

tools.name: deleteExternalFlow
tools.description: Delete an external flow for a protect surface

tools.name: createCase
tools.description: Create a new support case/ticket

tools.name: getCase
tools.description: Get case details by ID

tools.name: updateCasePriority
tools.description: Update the priority of an existing case

tools.name: updateCasePrimaryContact
tools.description: Update the primary contact email for a case

tools.name: updateCaseSubject
tools.description: Update the subject of an existing case

tools.name: escalateCase
tools.description: Escalate a case to higher priority attention

tools.name: deescalateCase
tools.description: De-escalate a case back to normal handling

tools.name: addNoteToCase
tools.description: Add a note/comment to an existing case

tools.name: closeCase
tools.description: Request to close a case
